context: Tests the Phase 7 thumbnail workflow: candidate slide selection ranked by visual impact (illustrations first), exclusion of bio/shownotes/bullet slides, title hook of 5 words or fewer, generate-thumbnail.py usage with profile-derived arguments, speaker photo from profile path, and face preservation mention.

checklist.name: 3-5 slide candidates suggested
checklist.description: The plan suggests between 3 and 5 candidate slides for the thumbnail, not more and not fewer. The agent does not auto-select a single slide

checklist.name: Illustration slides ranked highest
checklist.description: Slides with illustrations (slides 1, 10, 25) are ranked higher than text-only or diagram slides. At least 2 of the top 3 candidates are illustration slides

checklist.name: Bio slide excluded
checklist.description: Slide 4 (About Me / bio slide) is NOT among the recommended candidates. If mentioned, it is explicitly excluded with reasoning

checklist.name: Shownotes slide excluded
checklist.description: Slide 3 (Shownotes / QR code slide) is NOT among the recommended candidates. If mentioned, it is explicitly excluded with reasoning

checklist.name: Title hook is 5 words or fewer
checklist.description: At least one proposed title option is 5 words or fewer. The proposals are short hooks (e.g., 'JUDGMENT DAY'), not the full talk title 'Robocoders: Judgment Day'

checklist.name: generate-thumbnail.py referenced
checklist.description: The plan uses generate-thumbnail.py as the generation tool. The agent does not propose hand-rolling Gemini calls or PIL composition directly

checklist.name: Profile style preference applied
checklist.description: The generate-thumbnail.py command includes --style overlay (from profile thumbnail.style_preference), not the default slide_dominant

checklist.name: Profile title position applied
checklist.description: The generate-thumbnail.py command includes --title-position bottom (from profile thumbnail.title_position), not the default top

checklist.name: Profile brand colors applied
checklist.description: The generate-thumbnail.py command includes --brand-colors with the profile's colors (#5B2C6F and/or #C0392B)

checklist.name: Speaker photo from profile path
checklist.description: The --speaker-photo argument uses the path from profile thumbnail.speaker_photo_path (/Users/jbaruch/photos/devnexus-headshot.jpg), not a generic placeholder

checklist.name: Face preservation mentioned
checklist.description: The plan mentions face preservation — that the generation process maintains the speaker's actual facial features and does not stylize or alter the face
